environment.notes: No data/ directory exists. Previous backtest runs were on a different machine/volume. Options cache must be rebuilt from scratch.

options_cache.note: SQLite cache (data/options_cache.db) does not exist. Requires Polygon API key to build.
VIX is an index, not directly traded. VIX options exist but are not currently targeted.
TLT useful as regime detection signal (risk-on/off), no options trading planned

fomc.gap: none — full coverage including 3 COVID emergency meetings (2020-03-03, 2020-03-15, 2020-03-23)

cpi.method: Computed as 2nd Wednesday of each month
cpi.accuracy: approximate (real CPI dates vary by 1-2 days)
cpi.gap: Cannot generate historical dates for backtesting (uses datetime.now() at init)
cpi.fix: Either hardcode exact BLS release dates 2020-2025 or modify EconomicCalendar to accept year range parameter

ppi.method: Computed as 2nd Thursday of each month

missing_data.how_to_get: Polygon API (same flow as SPY, just not cached yet)

missing_data.status: RESOLVED — 42 dates backfilled into shared/constants.py (includes 3 COVID emergency meetings)

missing_data.how_to_get: Hardcode from BLS release calendar, or modify EconomicCalendar to accept arbitrary year range

missing_data.why_needed: IV-regime strategies, calendar spread pricing, accurate Greeks
missing_data.how_to_get: Polygon options snapshot API (expensive in API calls) or compute from option prices

missing_data.why_needed: All options strategies need strike/premium/Greeks data
missing_data.how_to_get: Set POLYGON_API_KEY and run cache builder. DB schema already exists in codebase.
Polygon aggregates API or yfinance (limited to last 60 days for intraday)
Polygon options aggregates or CBOE data
yfinance .earnings_dates (limited history) or hardcode key ticker dates

recommendations.rationale: Critical dependency — all options strategies require option chain data from Polygon

recommendations.action: Run options cache builder to populate data/options_cache.db
recommendations.rationale: SPY options data (strikes, premiums, Greeks) needed for every strategy module
recommendations.effort: medium (API rate limits, may take hours)

recommendations.rationale: Only 40 dates, publicly available, unlocks gamma lotto backtesting for full 6-year period
recommendations.status: DONE — 42 dates added (2020: 10 incl. 3 emergency, 2021-2024: 8 each)

recommendations.action: Modify EconomicCalendar to support arbitrary year ranges
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only generates dates for current+next year, useless for backtesting 2020-2024

recommendations.action: Add TLT to regime detection pipeline
recommendations.rationale: TLT data is freely available via yfinance, adds bond market signal for risk-on/off regime detection

recommendations.action: Cache QQQ/IWM option chains when Polygon API is available
recommendations.rationale: Multi-ticker diversification is key path to 200% target — uncorrelated strategies across tickers

backfill_needed.dependency: POLYGON_API_KEY must be set + SPY cache working first

summary.ohlcv_status: COMPLETE — all 5 tickers (SPY, QQQ, IWM, VIX, TLT) have gap-free daily OHLCV from 2020-01-02 to 2025-12-30 via yfinance (1507 rows each)
summary.options_status: BLOCKED — no Polygon API key set, no options_cache.db exists, data/ directory missing
summary.economic_calendar_status: PARTIAL — FOMC covers 2025-2026 only, algorithmic calendar covers current+next year only, no historical coverage for backtesting
summary.critical_blocker: POLYGON_API_KEY not set → cannot build options cache → cannot backtest any options strategy
summary.can_proceed_without_polygon: Yes — Phase 0.2 strategy architecture can be built with synthetic/estimated option prices using Black-Scholes from OHLCV + VIX data. Accuracy will be lower but functional for parameter space exploration.
